creator: reed@reedmedia.net
text:
I don't think I have been receiving any feedback from the GNATS for this 
ticket but I saw some emails to me for this ticket on the freebsd-www 
archives.

(I did receive an email off-list and not with GNATS early January from 
Remko. I emailed the image.)

Here is the image:

http://reedmedia.net/~reed/tmp-lic34t6v8974t/freebsd-basics-cover-front-145.png

Can someone please handle this PR?

Thanks,

  Jeremy C. Reed

p.s. Hopefully I receive a followup from GNATS on this email. Maybe the 
mails are getting stuck somewhere?
